title: The Exchange
desc: CNBC's 'The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors.

title: Power Lunch
desc: Brings the viewer corporate updates and minute by minute market moves, all rolled into 90 minutes of prime time show.

desc: The show that kicks off when the markets shut shop, with the real reasons behind the day's developments and the scoop on what's in store tomorrow.

desc: Body detoxification has been practiced for centuries. Detoxes and cleanses are all the rage right now, but are detoxes causing more harm than good?

desc: Business and finance news that tracks what is expected from the market based on cues from overnight US data and the status of markets in the East.

desc: A host presents top stories and headlines from markets, industries, government, entertainment, and sports, delivering clear, easy to understand updates for viewers about today's world.

desc: Take a look at how to make highly profitable decisions and select valuable stocks and sectors.

desc: Covers the intersection of politics and business during midday. Highlights how economic policy and current affairs are influencing investor decisions and market reactions.

desc: The show analyses the world of midcap stocks, enabling investors to make informed decisions. It is the ultimate resource to hunt for value.
